dict.string: Convos needs access to your Photo Library to save photos from conversations.
Convos uses your photo library when an assistant asks to read recent photos for a conversation.
Convos uses your contacts when an assistant asks to look up a person you've mentioned in a conversation.
Convos uses your calendar when an assistant asks to summarize or schedule events from a conversation.
Convos uses your calendar when an assistant asks to summarize or schedule events from a conversation.
Convos uses your reminders when an assistant asks to capture tasks from a conversation.
Convos uses your Apple Music library when an assistant asks about what you've been listening to.
Convos uses your location when an assistant asks where you are or to plan something nearby.
Convos uses HomeKit when an assistant asks to check or control your home accessories.
Convos uses Apple Health when an assistant asks about your activity, workouts, or sleep.
Convos uses Apple Health when an assistant logs a workout or activity for you.
Convos uses motion data when an assistant asks about your daily movement or workouts.
